prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热，石油工程、化工类等传统专业热度平稳；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约609800人，较2025年（物理类363040+历史类243714≈606754）略有增加，物理类考生估算约364660人，竞争环境略趋紧；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分逐年升至2025年459分，反映整体竞争加剧；该校位于北京市，在河北省招生占比约2.3%–3.0%（2021–2025年），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜效应；北京地域对河北考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次20009名、2026年缩招约8%（使位次数字下移约964名）及河北省考生总数小幅增加、省控线持续上升（使位次数字上移）等多重因素，缩招效应为主但考生竞争环境略紧形成对冲，预计2026年物理类最低位次约19095名，区间18595–19595名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16998 → 19795 → 21691 → 21772 → 20009, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, it rebounded compared to 2024 (ranking number decreased by about 1763). The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 20009–21772, with a baseline of about 20009 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 119 in 2021, 123 in 2022, 124 in 2023, 130 in 2024, and 137 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 126, a reduction of 11 (about -8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to lower the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 48–62 range in recent years, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions. The university has shown no significant signals in recent reputation monitoring, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission data, indicating stable application sentiment without notable negative incidents or gaps. The university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum and natural gas engineering as traditional advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular, while traditional majors like Petroleum Engineering and Chemical Engineering have stable popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is about 609,800, slightly increased from 2025 (Physics Category 363,040 + History Category 243,714 ≈ 606,754). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 364,660, indicating a slightly tighter competitive environment. For the provincial control line, the Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, reflecting intensified overall competition. The university is located in Beijing, with enrollment in Hebei Province accounting for about 2.3%–3.0% (2021–2025), as a cross-provincial enrollment without local preference. The Beijing region has some appeal to Hebei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 20009, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 8% (which lowers the ranking number by about 964), the slight increase in total Hebei candidates, and the continuous rise in the provincial control line (which raises the ranking number), the reduction effect is dominant but offset by a slightly tighter competitive environment. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 19095, with a range of 18595–19595.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 18500), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors.
